title: Avocado and Pilaf Bowl with Portuguese Flair
description: A hearty, flavorful bowl filled with roasted pilaf, creamy avocado, and a hint of Portuguese spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the cumin and paprika, and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cooked pilaf to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the pilaf is well coated with the spice mixture.
Scoop the pilaf into a bowl and top with diced avocado.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
